body:
### distinct failure
There is an excessively large gap between the Start button and the divider line to its right in the taskbar. This creates a visual imbalance compared to the spacing between the divider and other elements.

### Steps to Reproduce
1. Open the Portfolio OS.
2. Observe the taskbar at the bottom of the screen.
3. Compare the gap between the Start button and the divider line with the gap between the divider and the first application button.

### Expected Behavior
The divider line should be equidistant between the Start button and the first application window button. The gap between the Start button and the divider should match the gap between the divider and the application button to its right.

### Environment
- OS: Windows
- Browser: Multiple
title: [Bug]: Taskbar divider line gap inconsistent with Start button
